claimText: The WHO Pandemic Agreement is negotiated under Article 19 of the WHO Constitution.
evidenceExcerpt: The WHO Pandemic Agreement is negotiated under Article 19 of the WHO Constitution.
examUse: Statement-based question on the legal provisions enabling the WHO Pandemic Agreement.

claimText: The WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (2003) was the first international legal agreement negotiated under Article 19 of the WHO Constitution.
evidenceExcerpt: Second international legal agreement negotiated under Article 19 of the WHO Constitution (first being the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control, 2003).
examUse: Statement-based question on the history of WHO legal agreements.
distractorHooks: WHO Pandemic Agreement being the first
